channel.title: Summit on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Summit on jamesm.blog

item.title: AI Conferences Worth Following
item.description: A practical guide to the AI conferences worth following, who each type of event is for, and how to choose the right one before spending time or money.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Video Highlights
item.description: Video recordings and key takeaways from AWS Summit London 2023, including the opening keynote on generative AI, data strategy, and customer stories from Compare the Market and Arup.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda
item.description: Complete agenda of AWS Summit London 2023 with session codes, titles, and difficulty levels for all conference presentations.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda Announcement
item.description: AWS Summit London 2023 agenda announcement with keynote details, technical tracks, and planning guidance for attendees.

item.title: DevOps Conferences
item.description: Guide to major DevOps conferences and summits - KubeCon, DevOpsDays, PlatformCon, AWS re:Invent - covering cloud infrastructure, SRE, and platform engineering.
